hooks.command: { echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] 🔐 Permission requested for: $(jq -r '.tool_name' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')"; } >> ~/.claude/claude-notifications.log 2>&1 && printf '\a' && osascript -e "display notification \"$(jq -r '.tool_name' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Tool') needs permission\" with title \"Permission Required\" sound name \"Alarm\"" 2>/dev/null || true

{ echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] ❓ Claude is asking a question"; } >> ~/.claude/claude-notifications.log 2>&1 && printf '\a' && osascript -e "display notification \"Claude is waiting for your input\" with title \"Question Asked\" sound name \"Ping\"" 2>/dev/null || true

{ echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] ✅ Claude session completed"; } >> ~/.claude/claude-notifications.log 2>&1 && printf '\a' && osascript -e "display notification \"Work completed\" with title \"Claude Done\" sound name \"Submarine\"" 2>/dev/null || true
